services.name: AEO Optimization
services.heading: AI Search / Answer Engine Optimization
services.description: Discover how AI engines like Perplexity and ChatGPT perceive your brand. We audit and optimize your citation accuracy and GEO potential.
painPoints: Lack of structured data for AI consumption
services.metaDescription: Is your brand ready for the AI search revolution? Get a deep audit and optimization for ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Gemini.

services.name: Fractional SEO Lead
services.heading: Fractional SEO Leadership
services.description: High-level SEO strategy and team leadership without the overhead of a full-time executive.
painPoints: Lack of clear organic growth direction
No bridge between marketing and dev teams
services.metaTitle: Fractional SEO Lead | Strategic Growth Leadership
services.metaDescription: Expert SEO leadership for scaling companies. Get executive-level strategy and team coordination to drive organic revenue.

services.name: SEO Revenue Strategy
services.heading: Revenue-Driven SEO Strategy
services.description: Stop focusing on vanity metrics. We build SEO strategies that align directly with your bottom-line revenue goals.
painPoints: Traffic is up but revenue is flat
No clear ROI from SEO efforts
services.metaTitle: SEO Revenue Strategy | Performance SEO Plans
services.metaDescription: Align your SEO with your bottom line. We build strategies focused on pipeline revenue, not just traffic volume.

services.name: SEO Strategy Sprint
services.heading: 6-Week SEO Strategy Sprint
services.description: A high-intensity, structured period of optimization designed to see rapid signals and set a long-term roadmap.
painPoints: Slow SEO progress with legacy agencies
services.metaTitle: SEO Strategy Sprint | Rapid Organic Results
services.metaDescription: Accelerate your organic growth with a 6-week strategy sprint. Identify quick wins and build a scalable long-term engine.

services.name: Technical SEO Audit
services.heading: Enterprise Technical SEO Audit
services.description: Fixing the complex JavaScript, crawl budget, and indexing gridlocks that hold modern platforms back.
painPoints: Poor crawl efficiency on deep apps
services.metaTitle: Technical SEO Audit | Enterprise Scale Performance
services.metaDescription: Master Next.js and React SEO. We fix the technical issues that keep modern SaaS marketing sites from ranking.

services.name: Programmatic SEO Engine
services.heading: Scaling Content with Programmatic SEO
services.description: Build high-converting landing pages at scale using data-driven dynamic routing and intent-based templates.
services.metaTitle: Programmatic SEO Engine | Scale Content Automatically
services.metaDescription: Scale your organic footprint with programmatic SEO. Build thousands of high-converting pages automatically.

services.name: Content Velocity Machine
services.heading: High-Volume Authority Content Scaling
services.description: Accelerate your topical authority by publishing high-quality, expert-led content clusters at scale.
services.metaDescription: Build topical authority fast. Our content velocity machine scales your expert content clusters seamlessly.

services.name: Link Authority Builder
services.heading: Data-Driven Link Authority Building
services.description: Earn high-authority, relevant backlinks through proprietary data studies and digital PR.
services.metaDescription: Earn the links that matter. We build high-authority domain trust through data-driven digital PR and entity linking.
